summary: Iteration 120: Backend-only testing of Consegna (Delivery) features - DDT + DoP + CE modifications. All 15 tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) DDT number auto-generation with separate numbering for conto_lavoro (CL-YYYY-NNNN) vs vendita (DDT-YYYY-NNNN), (2) User-editable DDT numbers accepted, (3) DDT lines populated from preventivo descriptions via selected_line_indices, (4) Full client data stored in DDT documents, (5) DoP/CE PDF generation with company settings fallback, (6) CE PDF uses ingegnere_disegno field, (7) build_header_html no_client_border parameter removes DDT client border.

minor.issue: CommessaCreate model does NOT support tipo_commessa field - commesse must be created via from-preventivo endpoints or MongoDB direct insert to set tipo_commessa
minor.impact: Workaround exists - use /api/commesse/from-preventivo/{preventivo_id} for proper commessa creation

minor.issue: crea_consegna looks for comm.get('preventivo_id') at root level, but commessa stores it in moduli.preventivo_id or linked_preventivo_id when created via POST /api/commesse/
minor.impact: preventivo_id must be at root level of commessa document (happens when created via from-preventivo endpoint)

ddt_number_auto_generation_vendita.test: POST /api/commesse/{cid}/consegne without ddt_number on vendita commessa

ddt_number_auto_generation_conto_lavoro.test: POST /api/commesse/{cid}/consegne without ddt_number on conto_lavoro commessa

ddt_number_user_editable.result: PASS - Custom number accepted and stored

ddt_lines_from_preventivo.result: PASS - DDT lines populated from preventivo descriptions (4 lines)

selected_line_indices.result: PASS - Only selected lines included in DDT (2 lines)

full_client_data_in_ddt.test: DDT stores address, piva, cf, pec, sdi from client
full_client_data_in_ddt.result: PASS - All client fields stored in DDT document

ddt_type_assignment.test: DDT ddt_type field reflects commessa tipo_commessa

build_header_html_no_client_border.result: PASS - Removes border from client section (style="")

generate_dop_pdf_company_fallback.result: PASS - Falls back to company settings (certificato_en1090_numero, responsabile_nome, ente_certificatore)

generate_ce_pdf_ingegnere_disegno.result: PASS - CE PDF generated with Caratteristiche strutturali section

critical_code_review_comments: The code correctly implements separate DDT numbering (CL- vs DDT-) but relies on tipo_commessa field which is not set via standard commessa creation endpoint
DDT lines correctly sourced from preventivo.lines descriptions instead of material_batches as per requirements
DoP/CE fallback to company settings works as expected - cert_num, firmatario, ente all populated from company when not in fascicolo_tecnico
seed_data_creation: Test fixtures create: (1) test user/session via MongoDB, (2) test client with full fields, (3) test commesse via API and direct MongoDB insert for conto_lavoro type, (4) test preventivo with 4 lines
test_credentials: Auto-generated test user sessions cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 backend tests pass. DDT/DoP/CE consegna features verified. Note: tipo_commessa field for conto_lavoro requires creating commessa via from-preventivo endpoint or direct MongoDB insert - standard POST /api/commesse/ does not support this field in CommessaCreate model.
